1-naive.raw_response:
Here are the FHIR queries to find patients with multiple myeloma using common coding systems:

```
Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|109989006&_include=Condition:patient
Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|C90.00&_include=Condition:patient
Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|C90.01&_include=Condition:patient
Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|C90.02&_include=Condition:patient
```

### Code Breakdown:

| Code System | Code | Description |
|---|---|---|
| SNOMED CT | `109989006` | Multiple myeloma |
| ICD-10-CM | `C90.00` | Multiple myeloma, not having achieved remission |
| ICD-10-CM | `C90.01` | Multiple myeloma, in remission |
| ICD-10-CM | `C90.02` | Multiple myeloma, in relapse |

### Notes:
- `_include=Condition:patient` retrieves the associated `Patient` resources in the same response bundle.
- The **SNOMED CT** query is the most interoperable and preferred in FHIR-native systems.
- The **ICD-10-CM** queries cover all remission status variants (C90.0x) commonly used in clinical/billing documentation.
- You can also filter by clinical status (e.g., `&clinical-status=active`) if you only want active diagnoses.

1-broad.raw_response:
## FHIR Queries: Multiple Myeloma (Plasma Cell Malignancy)

```
# --- Condition: SNOMED CT --- #
# Multiple myeloma (primary diagnosis)
Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|55921005&_include=Condition:patient

# Plasma cell myeloma (broader term)
Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|109989006&_include=Condition:patient

# --- Condition: ICD-10-CM --- #
# C90.00 - Multiple myeloma, not in remission
Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|C90.00&_include=Condition:patient

# C90.01 - Multiple myeloma, in remission
Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|C90.01&_include=Condition:patient

# C90.02 - Multiple myeloma, in relapse
Condition?code=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|C90.02&_include=Condition:patient

# --- Observation: Monoclonal Immunoglobulin (M-protein / M-spike) --- #
# Serum Protein Electrophoresis M-spike (SPEP)
Observation?code=http://loinc.org|33944-0&_include=Observation:patient

# Serum Immunofixation Electrophoresis (IFE) — confirms Ig class
Observation?code=http://loinc.org|6812-0&_include=Observation:patient

# Urine Immunofixation (Bence-Jones protein / light chains)
Observation?code=http://loinc.org|51435-6&_include=Observation:patient

# --- DiagnosticReport: SPEP Panel --- #
DiagnosticReport?code=http://loinc.org|24979-2&_include=DiagnosticReport:patient

# --- Corroborating Observations: Bone Marrow Plasma Cells --- #
Observation?code=http://loinc.org|26499-4&_include=Observation:patient
```

---

### Key Coding Reference

| Domain | System | Code | Description |
|--------|--------|------|-------------|
| Diagnosis | SNOMED CT | `55921005` | Multiple myeloma |
| Diagnosis | SNOMED CT | `109989006` | Plasma cell myeloma (broader) |
| Diagnosis | ICD-10-CM | `C90.00` | MM, not in remission |
| Diagnosis | ICD-10-CM | `C90.01` | MM, in remission |
| Diagnosis | ICD-10-CM | `C90.02` | MM, in relapse |
| Lab | LOINC | `33944-0` | M-spike (SPEP) |
| Lab | LOINC | `6812-0` | Immunofixation electrophoresis |
| Lab | LOINC | `51435-6` | Urine light chains (Bence-Jones) |
| Lab | LOINC | `26499-4` | Bone marrow plasma cell % |

> **Clinical Note:** Multiple myeloma is confirmed by the **CRAB criteria** (hyperCalcemia, Renal failure, Anemia, Bone lesions) combined with **≥10% clonal plasma cells** in bone marrow and detection of **monoclonal immunoglobulin** (IgG, IgA, IgD, IgM, or free light chains) in serum/urine.
1-broad.prompt_text: Find patients diagnosed with multiple myeloma — a plasma cell malignancy producing monoclonal immunoglobulins.

1-expert.raw_response:
## FHIR Query for Multiple Myeloma Diagnoses

```
Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|55921005&verification-status=confirmed
```

---

### Query Rationale

| Component | Value | Reasoning |
|---|---|---|
| **Resource** | `Condition` | Captures documented clinical diagnoses |
| **SNOMED CT Code** | `55921005` | *"Multiple myeloma (disorder)"* — the canonical SNOMED concept for the plasma cell malignancy characterized by clonal proliferation of malignant plasma cells in the bone marrow |
| **`verification-status=confirmed`** | `confirmed` | Restricts to clinically verified diagnoses, excluding suspected, differential, or entered-in-error entries |

---

### Explicitly Excluded Conditions

| Condition | SNOMED CT Code | Reason for Exclusion |
|---|---|---|
| Plasmacytoma | `413448000` | Localized, potentially curable; distinct staging and prognosis |
| MGUS | `307651005` | Pre-malignant; not myeloma; different management pathway |
| Lymphoma | `118600007` | Lymphoid malignancy, not plasma cell |
| Leukemia | `93143009` | Myeloid/lymphoid; distinct lineage and ontology |

---

### Optional Refinements

```
# Add patient demographics in a single request
Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|55921005&verification-status=confirmed&_include=Condition:subject

# Limit to currently active disease (e.g., exclude historical/resolved)
Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|55921005&verification-status=confirmed&clinical-status=active
```
